title: North Star System Design
summary: Design north star describing kagent as a real-time autonomous work substrate with layered system model, flow economy, parent/child execution, promotion/review loops, and bounds for substrate inclusion.
notes: Manifest declared SPEC and was honored. Content self-identifies as 'design north star; not an implementation spec' and reads as a hybrid PRD/DOC: heavy on goals, non-goals, winning conditions, and product scope, with only a sketch SteeringEvent YAML and a north-star objects table — no endpoint tables, schemas, SLOs, or implementation contracts. PRD signals (goals/non-goals, winning conditions, interface model) outweigh SPEC signals. Synthesizer should consider downgrading precedence accordingly.
